notes: Confirmed TypeScript McpServer.registerTool registrations via registerAllTools called from createMcpServer; README/tests ignored. Candidate hints undercounted tourism.ts; full source has five tourism tools plus search and geojson.

metadata.name: explore_monuments_for_tourism
metadata.description: 観光向けの句碑探索を支援します。

parameters.name: poet_name
parameters.description: 俳人名（例: 松尾芭蕉、山口誓子）

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: 地域名（例: 東海、関東甲信、北陸）

parameters.name: season
parameters.description: 季節（春/夏/秋/冬）

parameters.name: prefecture
parameters.description: 都道府県名（例: 三重県）

parameters.name: municipality
parameters.description: 市区町村名（例: 伊勢市）

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: 最大取得件数（1-50、デフォルト: 10）

metadata.name: learn_about_monument
metadata.description: 特定の句碑について深く理解するための詳細情報を提供します。

parameters.name: monument_id
parameters.description: 句碑ID（数値）。IDが不明な場合は explore_monuments_for_tourism で先に検索してください

metadata.name: discover_nearby_monuments
metadata.description: 現在地や指定した場所の周辺にある句碑を発見します。

parameters.name: radius_meters
parameters.description: 検索半径（メートル、デフォルト: 1000m）

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: 最大取得件数（デフォルト: 5件）

parameters.name: prefecture
parameters.description: 都道府県で絞り込み（例: 三重県）。指定すると検索が高速化されます

parameters.name: place_query
parameters.description: 地点名やランドマーク（例: 金沢駅、兼六園）

metadata.name: analyze_monuments_statistics
metadata.description: 句碑データベースの包括的な統計分析を提供します。

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: 表示形式: summary=要約, detailed=詳細

metadata.name: compare_poets_styles
metadata.description: 複数の俳人の作風や特徴を比較分析します。

parameters.name: poet_names
parameters.description: 比較する俳人名の配列（2-5名）

metadata.name: find_similar_monuments
metadata.description: 類似の句碑を検索

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: 検索テキスト

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: 取得件数

metadata.name: get_haiku_monuments_geojson
metadata.description: 句碑データベースに登録されている句碑の情報をGeoJSON形式で表示

parameters.name: prefecture
parameters.description: 都道府県名で絞り込み（例: 三重県）

parameters.name: municipality
parameters.description: 市区町村名で絞り込み（例: 桑名市）

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: 地域名で絞り込み（例: 東海）

parameters.name: poet_name
parameters.description: 俳人名で絞り込み（例: 松尾芭蕉）

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: 取得件数（デフォルト: 50）

notes: Confirmed Go mcp-go server: main.go calls s.AddTools with five ServerTool values; each tool definition is mcp.NewTool and handler is the paired handle*Request function.

metadata.name: create_post
metadata.description: Create a new post in DocBase

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the post

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body content of the post

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Whether the post is a draft or not (default is false)

parameters.name: notice
parameters.description: Whether to send notification or not (default is true)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Scope of the post: 'everyone', 'group', or 'private' (default is 'everyone')

parameters.name: groups
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of group IDs (required if scope is 'group')

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number (default is 1)

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default is 20, max is 100)

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Whether the post is a draft or not

parameters.name: notice
parameters.description: Whether to send notification or not

parameters.name: tags

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Scope of the post: 'everyone', 'group', or 'private'

metadata.name: getAddress
metadata.description: Get the connected wallet address.

metadata.name: getChain
metadata.description: Get the chain ID and name the wallet is connected to.

metadata.name: getBalance
metadata.description: Get the native token (e.g., ETH) balance for a given address or the connected wallet.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The address to check the balance for (0x...). Defaults to the connected wallet address.

metadata.name: signMessage
metadata.description: Sign a message using the connected wallet.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The message to sign.

metadata.name: sendNativeToken
metadata.description: Sends native tokens (e.g., ETH) from the wallet to a specified address.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The recipient's blockchain address (0x...).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The amount of native tokens to send (e.g., '0.1').

metadata.name: getTokenBalance
metadata.description: Gets the ERC20 token balance for a specified owner address.

metadata.name: transferToken
metadata.description: Sends a specified amount of an ERC20 token to a recipient address.

metadata.name: getTokenTotalSupply
metadata.description: Get the total supply of an ERC20 token.

metadata.name: getTokenAllowance
metadata.description: Get the allowance an owner has granted to a spender for an ERC20 token.

metadata.name: approveToken
metadata.description: Approve a spender to withdraw an amount of an ERC20 token from the connected wallet. Use 'max' for amount to approve maximum.

metadata.name: revokeApproval
metadata.description: Revoke (set to 0) a spender's allowance for an ERC20 token from the connected wallet.

metadata.name: transferTokenFrom
metadata.description: Transfer an amount of an ERC20 token from one address to another, requires prior approval.

metadata.name: convertToBaseUnit
metadata.description: Convert a decimal token amount to its base unit representation.

metadata.name: convertFromBaseUnit
metadata.description: Convert a token amount from its base unit representation to a decimal string.

metadata.name: sql_execute_query
metadata.description: Execute a SQL query against SQL Server database. Returns query results or error details.

metadata.name: sql_execute_dql
metadata.description: Execute DQL (Data Query Language) statements - specifically SELECT queries. This is optimized for read-only queries and includes validation to ensure only SELECT statements are executed.

metadata.name: sql_execute_dml
metadata.description: Execute DML (Data Manipulation Language) statements - INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MERGE. This is optimized for data modification operations and includes validation to ensure only DML statements are executed.

metadata.name: sql_execute_ddl
metadata.description: Execute DDL (Data Definition Language) statements - CREATE, ALTER, DROP, TRUNCATE, etc. WARNING: Use with extreme caution as these operations modify or destroy database structure and cannot be rolled back easily.

metadata.name: sql_execute_procedure
metadata.description: Execute a stored procedure in SQL Server database. Returns procedure results or error details.

metadata.name: sql_get_database_info
metadata.description: Get SQL Server database connection information including version, database name, server name, and login name.

metadata.name: sql_discover_tables
metadata.description: Discover all tables in the SQL Server database. Optionally filter by schema name.

metadata.name: sql_get_table_info
metadata.description: Get detailed information about a specific table including columns, data types, constraints, indexes, foreign keys, and row count.
